1.author: Ahmed Ali
1.text: SAY: "HE IS God the one the most unique,

1.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
1.text: Proclaim (O dear Prophet Mohammed – peace and blessings be upon him), “He is Allah, He is One.”

1.author: Daryabadi
1.text: Say thou: He is Allah, the One!

1.author: Hilali & Khan
1.text: Say (O Muhammad (Peace be upon him)): "He is Allah, (the) One.

1.author: Maududi
1.text: Say: “He is Allah, the One and Unique;

1.author: Pickthall
1.text: Say: He is Allah, the One!

1.author: Yusuf Ali
1.text: Say: He is Allah, the One and Only;

2.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
2.text: “Allah is the Un-wanting.” (Perfect, does not require anything.)

2.author: Hilali & Khan
2.text: "Allah-us-Samad (The Self-Sufficient Master, Whom all creatures need, He neither eats nor drinks).

2.author: Maududi
2.text: Allah, Who is in need of none and of Whom all are in need;

2.author: Pickthall
2.text: Allah, the eternally Besought of all!

2.author: Shakir
2.text: Allah is He on Whom all depend.

3.author: Ahmed Ali
3.text: He has begotten no one, and is begotten of none.

3.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
3.text: “He has no offspring, nor is He born from anything.”

3.author: Arberry
3.text: who has not begotten, and has not been begotten,

3.author: Daryabadi
3.text: He begetteth not, nor Was He begotten.

3.author: Hilali & Khan
3.text: "He begets not, nor was He begotten;

3.author: Itani
3.text: He begets not, nor was He begotten.

3.author: Maududi
3.text: He neither begot any nor was He begotten,

3.author: Mubarakpuri
3.text: "He begets not, nor was He begotten."

3.author: Pickthall
3.text: He begetteth not nor was begotten.

3.author: Qarai
3.text: He neither begat, nor was begotten,

3.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
3.text: Who has not given birth, and has not been born,

3.author: Saheeh International
3.text: He neither begets nor is born,

3.author: Sarwar
3.text: He neither begets nor was He begotten.

3.author: Shakir
3.text: He begets not, nor is He begotten.

3.author: Wahiduddin Khan
3.text: He does not give birth, nor was He born,

3.author: Yusuf Ali
3.text: He begetteth not, nor is He begotten;

4.author: Ahmed Ali
4.text: There is no one comparable to Him."

4.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
4.text: “And there is none equal to Him.”

4.author: Arberry
4.text: and equal to Him is not any one.'

4.author: Daryabadi
4.text: And there hath never been co-equal with Him anyone.

4.author: Hilali & Khan
4.text: "And there is none co-equal or comparable unto Him."

4.author: Itani
4.text: And there is nothing comparable to Him.”

4.author: Maududi
4.text: and none is comparable to Him.”

4.author: Mubarakpuri
4.text: "And there is none comparable to Him."

4.author: Pickthall
4.text: And there is none comparable unto Him.

4.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
4.text: and there is none equal to Him'

4.author: Saheeh International
4.text: Nor is there to Him any equivalent."

4.author: Sarwar
4.text: There is no one equal to Him.

4.author: Wahiduddin Khan
4.text: and there is nothing like Him."

4.author: Yusuf Ali
4.text: And there is none like unto Him.
